## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Short bullet list of what "done" looks like. -->
- [ ]

## Definition of Done
- [ ] `dotnet build` produces zero errors and zero warnings
- [ ] All existing tests pass; new tests added if behaviour changed
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs, responses, or committed files
- [ ] Code self-reviewed (no debug leftovers, no commented-out code)
- [ ] PR reviewed and approved by at least one team member
